codeReview.summary: This fix closes the remaining blocking gap from the original Phase 8 review and the intermediate fix review. `bounds_of_generics` now carries outer generic trait bounds into `param_bounds` for `ItemImpl`, `ItemTraitImpl`, and `ItemTrait` before `check_fn_decl`, so the bounded-generic method lookup added in `b43379d` can resolve trait methods from enclosing generic declarations as well as method-local ones. The added regression tests cover all three affected item forms and directly exercise the previously failing outer-bound cases.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, prior failure reviews, and commit `e7aeba8`. The patch propagates outer generic bounds from impls, trait impls, and trait declarations into method/default-body typechecking, which resolves the original bounded-generic trait-method failure and the remaining outer-bound propagation gap noted in the intermediate fix review. I did not find any remaining blocking or non-blocking issues relevant to that failure.
